title: WCD UP Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 198 Anganwadi Worker Posts
description: The Women and Child Development (WCD) UP has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 198 Anganwadi Worker Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Intermediate (10+2) can grab this chance and apply for the WCD UP Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026 that you can...
